name: Apache Pinot
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0); self-hosted or StarTree Cloud (managed service)

auth.notes: Self-hosted: configurable; StarTree Cloud: API key

performance.notes: Sub-10ms queries on billions of rows; optimized for real-time analytics and dashboards

agent_readiness.notes: Real-time OLAP datastore designed for user-facing analytics at LinkedIn/Uber-scale. Sub-10ms latency on billions of rows. Columnar storage, inverted indexes, star-tree indexes. Real-time ingestion from Kafka. SQL query interface. Upserts for mutable data. Used by LinkedIn (400+ billion rows/day), Uber, Slack for user-facing analytics. Python/Java/Go clients via REST API.

gotchas: Complex cluster management (Controller, Broker, Server, Minion components)
Schema changes require table re-creation or segment reload
Limited JOIN support (designed for denormalized data)
best_when: User-facing analytics dashboards requiring sub-second latency on billions of rows
Multi-tenant analytics where query isolation matters
High-concurrency dashboard queries that would overload traditional databases
avoid_when: Small datasets where ClickHouse or DuckDB simpler
Teams without dedicated data infrastructure engineers
summary: Apache Pinot is a real-time OLAP datastore for user-facing analytics at massive scale. Sub-10ms queries on billions of rows via columnar storage and star-tree indexes. Real-time Kafka ingestion. Used by LinkedIn (400B+ rows/day), Uber, and Slack. Best for high-concurrency user-facing dashboards requiring consistent sub-second latency at extreme scale.
